mnemonics: The Expert is a FORCE: Forecasting Outcomes of Rational Choices Efficiently
keyPoints: Experts are online algorithms that make sequential predictions against an adversarial environment.
The goal is to perform nearly as well as the best fixed expert in hindsight, minimizing regret.
Algorithms like Hedge (Exponential Weights) are used to aggregate expert advice and prove no-regret guarantees.
commonMistakes: Confusing expert algorithms with equilibrium concepts like Nash Equilibrium.
Assuming the adversary is non-adaptive or stochastic, when the theory is designed for worst-case adaptive adversaries.
Forgetting that the weights on experts are updated multiplicatively (exponentially) based on their loss, not additively.
